name: prompt registry version migration block declares delta_status as zero-delta or justified-delta with reason
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        migration:
          from_inline_agent: true
          golden_output_diff: x
          delta_status: justified-delta:fix-edge-case
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml --check migration 2>out.txt && grep -q 'delta_status=justified-delta' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=fix-edge-case' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
